scripts.dev: npm run dev:stop && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend "npm --prefix Backend run dev" "npm --prefix Frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:stop: for p in 8080 5173 5174 5175; do lsof -ti tcp:$p | xargs kill -15 2>/dev/null || true; done
scripts.check: npm --prefix Backend run check && npm --prefix Frontend run build
